{"compiler":{"version":"0.8.26+commit.8a97fa7a"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"IS_SCRIPT","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"run","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Deploys the three test-specific token contracts and wires up roles. `cartesi run` already provides TestToken (ERC20), TestNFT (ERC721), and TestMultiToken (ERC1155) \u2014 this script only deploys what those don't cover:   \u2022 TestERC721    \u2014 mintable ERC721 we fully control (token IDs 1-5 pre-minted)   \u2022 TestERC1155   \u2014 mintable ERC1155 with TOKEN_A/B/C/D pre-minted   \u2022 MintableERC721 \u2014 ERC721 gated by MINTER_ROLE (for voucher-mint tests) Required env vars:   CARTESI_APP_ADDRESS  \u2014 shown by `cartesi run` or `cartesi address-book`   PRIVATE_KEY          \u2014 Anvil default: 0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 Usage (while `cartesi run` is running):   forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://localhost:8545 --broadcast
